name: backend
description: Backend engineering skill pack for API contracts, data persistence, security, reliability, observability, performance, Go, FastAPI, Django, framework patterns, and backend code review.

interface.longDescription: Backend provides curated local skills for architecture decisions, REST and OpenAPI contracts, database schemas and migrations, authentication and authorization, observability, reliability, performance, Go/Golang services, FastAPI services, Django/DRF services, framework-specific route patterns, and backend code review. The pack is synthesized from SkillsMP marketplace candidates and local project rules.
defaultPrompt: Use $backend-engineering to choose backend architecture tradeoffs.
Use $backend-api-contracts to design a REST API contract.
Use $backend-data-persistence to plan a schema or migration.
Use $backend-security-auth to harden authentication and authorization.
Use $backend-golang to build or review a Go backend service.
Use $backend-fastapi to build or review a FastAPI backend service.
Use $backend-django to build or review a Django or DRF backend.
